Alerting Rules

All Rules 13
💰 Financial 5
🚛 Operational 3
👤 Driver 3
📋 Compliance 2
Category ▾
Severity ▾
Status ▾
1 – 13 of 13
Rule NameCategorySeverityThreshold / ConditionModeNotifyFires (30d)FP RateStatus
Critical
Loss-making trip detection
R-001
Margin below 0% — fires immediately when trip goes underwater
 💰 Financial Critical Margin < 0% Real-time Owner + Dispatcher 3 0%
Driver pattern detection ⚡ COMPOUND
R-012
3+ alerts same driver in 7 days — escalates to owner automatically
 👤 Driver Critical 3+ alerts, same driver, 7 days Real-time Owner 2 0%
Insurance expired during active trip
R-011
Vehicle in transit with lapsed insurance — legal + liability risk
 📋 Compliance Critical Insurance expired + in transit Real-time Owner + Compliance 1 0%
Unauthorized trip start NEW
R-013
Trip initiated outside assigned hours or by unassigned driver
 👤 Driver Critical Unassigned driver or off-hours start Real-time Owner + Dispatcher 0 —
Route deviation detection
R-005
>20 km off planned route — catches detours and theft risk
 🚛 Operational Critical >20 km off planned route Real-time Dispatcher 5 8%
Expense overrun detection
R-002
>15% above estimate — feeds directly into R-001 loss story
 💰 Financial Critical >15% above estimate Real-time Dispatcher 8 12%
Trip not completed / missed delivery NEW
R-014
Trip past deadline with no POD confirmation — client SLA breach
 🚛 Operational Critical Past deadline + no POD Real-time Owner + Client ops 0 —
High
Trip delay — SLA at risk
R-006
>2h behind ETA — most-fired rule, high customer impact
 🚛 Operational High >2 hours behind ETA Real-time Fleet Manager 22 10%
Overspeeding (loaded vehicle)
R-008
>80 km/h loaded — clean signal, easy to demo live
 👤 Driver High >80 km/h (loaded) Real-time Fleet Manager 34 5%
Fuel cost anomaly 📊 DYNAMIC
R-003
>20% above route baseline — shows AI-driven threshold intelligence
 💰 Financial High >20% above route baseline Real-time Fleet Manager 14 18%
Engine idle burn cost NEW
R-015
Engine on, vehicle stationary >30 min — calculates and shows ₹ wasted
 💰 Financial High Idle >30 min + engine on Real-time Dispatcher 0 —
Driver license expiry NEW
R-016
License expires within 14 days — proactive, legally essential
 📋 Compliance High License expiry < 14 days Batch daily Compliance + Owner 0 —
Info
Fleet profitability weekly digest NEW 📊 OWNER VIEW
R-017
Weekly roll-up: margin by route, driver, vehicle — owner's business pulse
 💰 Financial Info Weekly margin roll-up Batch weekly Owner 0 —

7
All real-time · Auto-escalation
High Rules
5
4 real-time · 1 batch daily
Info Rules

Batch weekly · Owner digest
